title: serapias × fallax
intro: Serapias × fallax, also known as the hybrid autumn lady's tresses, is a rare orchid plant that is a cross between the species Serapias cordifolia and Serapias vomeracea. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Serapias × fallax include its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Serapias × fallax typically involve the use of the plant's rhizome and roots, which can be dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures.
